title: bromus rubens var. rigidus
intro: Bromus rubens var. rigidus, also known as stiff brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bromus rubens var. rigidus include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
